ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND(SBQQ__Ordered__c = TRUE , OR(ISCHANGED(Booking_Date__c) , ISCHANGED( OSA_Signature_Date__c ) , ISCHANGED( SBQQ__SubscriptionTerm__c ) , ISCHANGED( SBQQ__Primary__c ) , ISCHANGED( SBQQ__Account__c ) , ISCHANGED( SBQQ__BillingFrequency__c ) , ISCHANGED( Invoicing_Contact__c ) , ISCHANGED( Software_Delivery_Contact__c ) , ISCHANGED( SBQQ__BillingCity__c ) , ISCHANGED( SBQQ__BillingCountry__c ) , ISCHANGED( SBQQ__BillingName__c ) , ISCHANGED( SBQQ__BillingPostalCode__c ) , ISCHANGED( SBQQ__BillingState__c ) , ISCHANGED( SBQQ__BillingStreet__c ) , ISCHANGED( SBQQ__ShippingCity__c ) , ISCHANGED( SBQQ__ShippingCountry__c ) , ISCHANGED( SBQQ__ShippingName__c ) , ISCHANGED( SBQQ__ShippingPostalCode__c ) , ISCHANGED( SBQQ__ShippingState__c ) , ISCHANGED( SBQQ__ShippingStreet__c ))) && $User.Email != "manuela.lorenzi-kayser@intapp.com"
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Below fields can't be updated after a quote is ordered: Booking Date, OSA Signature Date, Contract Term, Primary, Account, Billing Frequency, Billing Address, Shipping Address, Invoicing Contact, Software Delivery Contact
